data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Rises As Iran Move Trumps U.S. Pause; Meta, These Titans Breaking Down
data.description: As a result of Iran's decision to turn back ships at the Strait of Hormuz despite a deadline extension from President Trump, futures experienced a decline. This news has caused concern in the market, leading to a breakdown in prominent companies such as Meta, Microsoft, and Google. The Dow Jones futures are down while oil prices are on the rise due to Iran's actions overshadowing the pause from the U.S. The impact of these events has been significant, prompting investors to closely monitor the situation as it unfolds.

data.title: OceanaGold Files Annual Information Form and Updated Technical Reports for Haile, Macraes and Didipio
data.description: OceanaGold Corporation, a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol OGC and on the OTCQX under OCANF, headquartered in Vancouver, BC, made an announcement on March 27, 2026. The company revealed that it has submitted its Annual Information Form, as well as revised technical reports that adhere to National Instrument 43 - 101 - Standards.

data.title: Natural Grocers® and Rodale Institute Celebrate Earth Month With Annual Ladybug Love Campaign, April 1-30, 2026
data.description: Natural Grocers® is collaborating with Rodale Institute for Earth Month 2026 to promote regenerative organic farming. Customers are invited to participate through pledges, purchases, and register donations. This initiative in Lakewood, Colo., aims to support sustainable agriculture practices.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For March 27, 2026
data.description: Before the market opens, several companies will be reporting their earnings. Instil Bio (NASDAQ: TIL) is expected to release its fourth-quarter earnings. BioXcel Therapeutics (NASDAQ: BTAI) is projected to announce a quarterly loss of $0.52 per share with revenue of $142 thousand. Legence (NASDAQ: LGN) is expected to report earnings of $0.02 per share, generating $618.01 million in revenue. Werewolf Therapeutics (NASDAQ: HOWL) is anticipated to report a quarterly loss of $0.34 per share with revenue totaling $600 thousand. Humacyte (NASDAQ: HUMA) is estimated to post a quarterly loss of $0.13 per share on revenue of $1.44 million. Autolus Therapeutics (NASDAQ: AUTL) is projected to report a quarterly loss of $0.38 per share. To find out more details, the complete article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ParaZero Issues CEO Letter to Shareholders: Reports Strong Revenue Growth for Full Year 2025
data.description: In KFAR SABA, Israel, on March 27, 2026, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO) released a shareholder letter from their CEO, Ariel Aron. The company focuses on developing intelligent, autonomous products for both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS) globally. ParaZero is known for its innovative solutions in the aerospace defense sector.
